Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class AbstractLoopContractBuiltInRuleApp<T extends BuiltInRule>

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractBuiltInRuleApp<T>
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp<T>
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractLoopContractBuiltInRuleApp<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
IBuiltInRuleApp, RuleApp
Direct Known Subclasses:
LoopContractExternalBuiltInRuleApp, LoopContractInternalBuiltInRuleApp
public abstract class AbstractLoopContractBuiltInRuleApp<T extends BuiltInRule> extends AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp<T>
Application of AbstractLoopContractRule.
